templates.description: This output lists information about the specified job templates.

nextToken.description: This output displays the token for the next set of job templates.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the job template was created.

createdBy.description: The user who created the job template.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the job template.

jobTemplateData.description: The job template data which holds values of StartJobRun API request.

executionRoleArn.description: The execution role ARN of the job run.

releaseLabel.description: The release version of Amazon EMR.

configurationOverrides.description: The configuration settings that are used to override defaults configuration.

applicationConfiguration.description: The configurations for the application running by the job run.

persistentAppUI.description: Monitoring configurations for the persistent application UI.

s3MonitoringConfiguration.description: Amazon S3 configuration for monitoring log publishing.

jobDriver.description: Specify the driver that the job runs on. Exactly one of the two available job drivers is required, either sparkSqlJobDriver or sparkSubmitJobDriver.

sparkSubmitJobDriver.description: The job driver parameters specified for spark submit.

sparkSubmitParameters.description: The Spark submit parameters that are used for job runs.

sparkSqlParameters.description: The Spark parameters to be included in the Spark SQL command.

parameterConfiguration.description: The configuration of parameters existing in the job template.

jobTags.description: The tags assigned to jobs started using the job template.

kmsKeyArn.description: The KMS key ARN used to encrypt the job template.

decryptionError.description: The error message in case the decryption of job template fails.

nextToken.description: The token for the next set of security configurations to return.

arn.description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) of the security configuration.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the job run was created.

createdBy.description: The user who created the job run.

authorizationConfiguration.description: Authorization-related configuration input for the security configuration.

lakeFormationConfiguration.description: Lake Formation related configuration inputs for the security configuration.

authorizedSessionTagValue.description: The session tag to authorize Amazon EMR on EKS for API calls to Lake Formation.

secureNamespaceInfo.description: The namespace input of the system job.

queryEngineRoleArn.description: The query engine IAM role ARN that is tied to the secure Spark job. The QueryEngine role assumes the JobExecutionRole to execute all the Lake Formation calls.

encryptionConfiguration.description: Encryption-related configuration input for the security configuration.

inTransitEncryptionConfiguration.description: In-transit encryption-related input for the security configuration.

tags.description: The tags to assign to the security configuration.

virtualClusters.description: This output lists the specified virtual clusters.

nextToken.description: This output displays the token for the next set of virtual clusters.

containerProvider.description: The container provider of the virtual cluster.

type.description: The type of the container provider. Amazon EKS is the only supported type as of now.

eksInfo.description: The information about the Amazon EKS cluster.

namespace.description: The namespaces of the Amazon EKS cluster.

nodeLabel.description: The nodeLabel of the nodes where the resources of this virtual cluster can get scheduled. It requires relevant scaling and policy engine addons.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the virtual cluster is created.

tags.description: The assigned tags of the virtual cluster.

id.description: The output contains the ID of the cancelled job run.

virtualClusterId.description: The output contains the virtual cluster ID for which the job run is cancelled.

id.description: This output display the created job template ID.

name.description: This output displays the name of the created job template.

arn.description: This output display the ARN of the created job template.

createdAt.description: This output displays the date and time when the job template was created.

id.description: The output contains the ID of the managed endpoint.

name.description: The output contains the name of the managed endpoint.

arn.description: The output contains the ARN of the managed endpoint.

virtualClusterId.description: The output contains the ID of the virtual cluster.

arn.description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) of the security configuration.

id.description: This output contains the virtual cluster ID.

name.description: This output contains the name of the virtual cluster.

arn.description: This output contains the ARN of virtual cluster.

id.description: This output contains the ID of the job template that was deleted.
The output displays the ID of the managed endpoint.

virtualClusterId.description: The output displays the ID of the endpoint's virtual cluster.

id.description: This output contains the ID of the virtual cluster that will be deleted.

jobRun.description: The output displays information about a job run.

virtualClusterId.description: The ID of the job run's virtual cluster.

clientToken.description: The client token used to start a job run.

executionRoleArn.description: The execution role ARN of the job run.

configurationOverrides.description: The configuration settings that are used to override default configuration.

applicationConfiguration.description: The configurations for the application running by the job run.

managedLogs.description: The entity that controls configuration for managed logs.

allowAWSToRetainLogs.description: Determines whether Amazon Web Services can retain logs.

encryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon resource name (ARN) of the encryption key for logs.

persistentAppUI.description: Monitoring configurations for the persistent application UI.

logGroupName.description: The name of the log group for log publishing.

logStreamNamePrefix.description: The specified name prefix for log streams.

s3MonitoringConfiguration.description: Amazon S3 configuration for monitoring log publishing.

logUri.description: Amazon S3 destination URI for log publishing.

rotationSize.description: The file size at which to rotate logs. Minimum of 2KB, Maximum of 2GB.

maxFilesToKeep.description: The number of files to keep in container after rotation.

jobDriver.description: Parameters of job driver for the job run.

sparkSubmitJobDriver.description: The job driver parameters specified for spark submit.

sparkSubmitParameters.description: The Spark submit parameters that are used for job runs.

sparkSqlParameters.description: The Spark parameters to be included in the Spark SQL command.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the job run was created.

createdBy.description: The user who created the job run.

finishedAt.description: The date and time when the job run has finished.

stateDetails.description: Additional details of the job run state.

failureReason.description: The reasons why the job run has failed.

tags.description: The assigned tags of the job run.

retryPolicyConfiguration.description: The configuration of the retry policy that the job runs on.

maxAttempts.description: The maximum number of attempts on the job's driver.

retryPolicyExecution.description: The current status of the retry policy executed on the job.

currentAttemptCount.description: The current number of attempts made on the driver of the job.

jobTemplate.description: This output displays information about the specified job template.

endpoint.description: This output displays information about a managed endpoint.

virtualClusterId.description: The ID of the endpoint's virtual cluster.

releaseLabel.description: The EMR release version to be used for the endpoint.

executionRoleArn.description: The execution role ARN of the endpoint.

certificateArn.description: The certificate ARN of the endpoint. This field is under deprecation and will be removed in future.

certificateAuthority.description: The certificate generated by emr control plane on customer behalf to secure the managed endpoint.

certificateArn.description: The ARN of the certificate generated for managed endpoint.

certificateData.description: The base64 encoded PEM certificate data generated for managed endpoint.

configurationOverrides.description: The configuration settings that are used to override existing configurations for endpoints.

managedLogs.description: The entity that controls configuration for managed logs.

allowAWSToRetainLogs.description: Determines whether Amazon Web Services can retain logs.
